But one nice thing about radix is it shows a historical trend line so we could track relative pricing and changes over time.
So that was important functionality that we got when we picked up radics.

They just think it should just all be given to you on a platter.
So I think there's some issues with expectations there that they're just what they're accustomed to they're not experiencing.
